programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Telltale Talk Show Host
programme.desc: Dr Sheila Carlin is good friends with Della who calls Perry in when she is being pestered by someone On the theory that it could be somebody that she works with at a radio stations she arranges Perry to be interviewed by Winslow Keene who is also the stations owner Winslow enrages the rest of the talk show hosts on the station by informing them of changes that he is making to their time slots That night Winslow is shot by a hit man hired by someone at the station and Sheila is set up for the murder She calls in Perry and as usual Perry Della and Ken swing into action to find out who really did it

programme.title: TBH 214
programme.desc: TBH 214

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction

programme.title: Munsters 121
programme.desc: Munsters 121

programme.title: Addams Family 107
programme.desc: Addams Family 107

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Suzanne doesnt know if boyfriend Alan loves her for her self or her money Mason falls for Alicia but her terrier doesnt like him Isaac falls for Selena who is engaged to someone else

programme.title: Daktari 222
programme.desc: Daktari 222

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Jonathan buys Jennifer a gorgeous old car for her birthday she is less than thrilled -- but two Brits seem suspiciously eager to take it off her hands

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey work to track down a murderer who managed to kill a newly-paroled cop-killer who was under their protection

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Hutchs girlfriend is a drug kingpins moll attempting to start a new life The kingpin wants her back and orders his goons to abduct Hutch and addict him to heroin For another fix will the strung-out Hutch divulge her hidden location

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.desc: Addams 204

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa wants nothing to do with his wealthy new neighbors

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are dubious when Luke gets a part-time job as a shoe salesman but when he loses the job the rest of the McCoys unknowingly come to his aid by going to the store en masse to buy shoes

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Predatory electronics salesman Jack Rhodes uses a video dating service to pick up lonely young women for one-night stands but meets his match in cunning enticing Barbara who invites Jack on a date to her high-rise apartment loft

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While passing through a small town Eric is shot and buried by a deranged cop-wannabe who is murdering vagrants while impersonating a police officer Alamo Joe catches up to Eric and Eric convinces him that the phony cop is a serial killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes into a town looking for Skorzany after hearing about several murders by a skinwalker He learns from a Native American medicine man that there may be a cure In the end Eric finds out that the cure was a lie and he moves on

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: It has been more than forty years since Nick has seen his close friend Katherine Barrington and her secretary Madelyn Pinchot

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Mickis young nephew befriends the reanimated corpse of a boy residing in the local haunted house

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: He just wants to get out of town and skip college in his restored Ford Mustang and she will do anything at all to join a local sorority Omega Kappa Pi which proves to be her ultimate downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A life on the edge hot rodder named Billy comes to town run by Sheriff Garrett he immediately dates and romances his daughter with ulterior motives linked to Garretts past for which he was once a champion of the hot rodding Will Garrett accept Billys challenge to the death

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A mousy librarian over-react reports of a serial killer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: An Arabian prince is protected by Max and an Israeli agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: A team has made a super computer police car that can tell everything wrong with vehicles generating huge for police depts FBI etc They target and harass BJ McKay and others to put them out of business BJ and his friends decide to fight back against this car that seems to know their every step

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must reverse course when efforts to make Klink look competent before the Nazi Inspector General get the Kommandant promoted with a transfer to Berlin

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans efforts to help a German baroness to escape are thwarted by Klink who has arranged for the transfer of a British prisoner who is senior to Colonel Hogan

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Virgil loses the 73 and McHale and The Crew must arrange for a replacement before they can take a weeks RR trip to New Caledonia

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The 73 Crew avert an attack on a Navy convoy by employing a clever plan involving John Wayne Humphrey Bogart and Errol Flynn

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter tries to make Gomer dislike him before graduation feeling that he hasnt done his job correctly if he isnt hated by ALL the recruits Sgt Carter asks for a transfer to California but things dont go quite as he expects

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While in town on pass Sgt Carter decides to play a joke on Gomer by setting him on a quest to get a kiss from The Dragon Lady but in order for it to work he will need Dukes help

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: verybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa and Luke attempt to build a rowboat

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Amos mocks Georges painting cheap junk dealer Daggett pays twenty dollars for a painting by George at the McCoy farm so Amos encourages Georges painting to be his manager unaware that Daggett has actually paid for the frame

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is investigating a madman who is blowing up high-rise buildings though CONTROL is not sure how he is doing it

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: After passing a ninja master test in Japan Cole visits a war buddy in the Philippines He helps him fight men who want his buddys plantation

programme.title: WKRP 208
programme.desc: WKRP 208

programme.title: WKRP 107
programme.desc: WKRP 107

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: As mayor Wood must deal with the towns garbage crisis

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood is concerned that now that Taylor is off to college hes not learning to be independent

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Las Vegas private eye Dan Tanna probes the murder of Marilyn Ochs a teenage prostitute who ran away from home because she didnt get along well with her mother Lorettas new husband Merle

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Marital suspicions lead a woman to accidentally kill her husband but when his debt-ridden brother tries to step into his place the Harts blow his cover and the widow may take her own revenge

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: While Kirk goes in for surgery Larry Darryl and Darryl mind the Minuteman Café

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor and Daan travel to a cloister for an energy sharing ceremony but one of the sisters is killed and everyone is a suspect

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood team consults with noted linguist Adrian Bouchard Cedric Smith to decipher the aliens transmissions

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane has created a poison engineered to specifically target Swamp Things genetic code Ann has discovered a method of temporarily changing Alec back to human form

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Temporally displaced Confederate Civil War soldiers appear in the swamp one of whom is a previous residence of Wills house Will helps the man to discover the mystery behind his wartime disappearance and make peace with his past so he can pass on

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter an eccentric and intelligent robot who is known as Brian the Brain Brians creator Captain Michael and his crew have all died in mysterious circumstances and Brian asks for the help of Koenig and his crew However it soon becomes very apparent that Brian is anything but harmless and was in fact responsible for the deaths of Captain Michael and his colleagues And he is ready to do the same to the Alphans unless they supply him with enough nuclear fuel to sustain him forever

programme.title: Battletruck
programme.desc: Post World War III futuristic tale of collapsed governments bankrupt countries heralding a new lawless age

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Hercules 218
programme.desc: Hercules 218

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor agrees to do a live television interview to try to endear himself to humans but the shows producer has an ulterior motive in getting him in front of a camera

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A lonely maiden woman in her mid 40s is stalked and targeted by a psychotic drifter Meanwhile she has a long term affair with a Canadian political leader Stone and Keller need to solve several mysteries

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMFs target is Poltroni an international drug dealer Poltroni alias Ted Carson is in a country with no extradition treaty with the United States Briggs devises a plan to lure Poltroni to a neighboring country where he can be arrested and sent to the US To execute the scheme Barney will have to fight for his life against one of Poltronis thugs while Cinammon will be bait for Poltroni Also getting Poltroni to the border wont be easy Its about 100 miles away

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon work the hospital round They are called to talk to a mentally-challenged man who threatens to blow up a radio station

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are in the courtroom testifying in a case in which the probable cause for them to conduct a search of the suspects car is in question The probable cause is to be provided by a witness who is late arriving to court

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The 12-year-old nephew of Dr Kimbles girlfriend arrives to live with her and recognizes him He hatches a plan with his neighborhood friends to catch him by purchasing a mail-order rifle

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: When a sunken Barkley riverboat is finally found its cargo of gold is missing and the late family patriarch is suspected to have stolen it

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Jacob Willis a trusted employee of a local businessman pays money to a skid-row drifter who was blackmailing him After Jacob leaves him the drifter is accidentally killed in a scuffle with two other hobos One of them tells the police that Jacob killed the man After talking to Jacob Stone has doubts that he could be a killer but then he finds out what the drifter knew about Jacob that he escaped from an Alabama prison 25 years ago Jacob believes he killed a guard during the escape and thinks he must run away or face imprisonment His employers young son trusts Jacob and wants to run away with him

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Captain Newman MD
programme.desc: In 1944 an Army doctor is in charge of a neuropsychiatric ward at an Army Air Corps hospital in Arizona and he must deal with a variety of tough cases

programme.title: Bail Out
programme.desc: A sleazy bail bondsman thinks he has finally gotten his big break when a millionaire heiress gets busted with drug dealers If she shows up in court it could mean a million dollars to him If she doesnt he could be ruined When the deal gets too complicated he hires a playboy bounty hunter to keep an eye on his investment But who is going to keep an eye on him

programme.title: Ator the Fighting Eagle
programme.desc: The son of Torren learns of his heritage goes to avenge the deaths of his fellow villagers and rescue his sister from the evil Dakkar and his spider cult

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 22 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. James Haddad vs. Steve Simms; Barrett "Too Cool" Thompson vs. Mike Goehr; Patrick Besarra vs. Reza Kamali.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ivan Buchinger v. Timur Nagibin

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Rodrigo Damm v. Kultar Singh Gill

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Adam Hensen v. Derek Jolivette

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ciaran Harrison v. Adeeb Islam

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nick Agallar v. Nardu Debrah

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Luke Theriault v. Justin Sander

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Josh Bangert v. Joe Laurence

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Jack Andrews v. Kingsley Crawford

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Vladimir Zenin v. Nick Aggalar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Viktor Kolesik v. Felipe Rego

programme.desc: Hicham Achalhi v. Andre Schmeling

programme.desc: Arvydas Pumutis v. Mobes Aeshoye

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Trevor Prangley v. Kyacey Uscola

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Moses Murrietta v. Andrey Seledtsov

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Yassin Baitar v. Jonay Risco

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tye Palmer v. Scott Rogan

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Zac Chalmers at HK40.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Josh Griffin

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Lucia Krajcovic v. Sammy Lee Brown

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Xavier Sedras v. Jefferson George

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Jerad Meyer v. Zach Snyder.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Dennis Papineau vs. Ryan "The Natural" Torrence; Derek Parker vs. Lloyd "Death" Valley; Wade Baldwin vs. Steve Arens.

programme.desc: Dalgiev Khamzat v. Dragan Pesic

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 22 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Chaleur "The Chainsaw" Jones vs. Kayla Matton; Cody Clarke vs. Bryce Berry; Ron Carriere vs. Keith Katona.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A warp zone that only opens every 1000 video years is the gateway for King Charles who wants to go home But his final decision is send Gameboy at his place The supercomputer Gameboy turns out to be a lot of trouble for the N team But things get worse when Mother Brain gets Gameboy and and Dr Wily turns him into Game Brain

programme.desc: Venger uses a time portal to change Earths history The team must stop him or they themselves may cease to exist
